training_status: weight training for 8 months, fit, strong

benefits.description: Tendonosis healed throughout body, high hamstring tendonosis resolved, elbow pain resolved, ankle strengthened, knee injury improved
Hip and hamstring pain completely resolved, can sleep in any position, no pain with sitting, standing, or sexual activity
Able to weight train, do pull-ups, weighted squats, run

side_effects.description: Ravenous appetite from BPC-157, required intermittent fasting
TB-500 worsened anxiety and caused nightmares, spikes cortisol

protocol_notes: Used approximately 7 vials of BPC-157 and 5 vials of TB-500 over ~10 months (March 2022 - December 2022). Each vial was 10mg. Used every other month after initial daily protocol. Mixed injection approach: sometimes local injections near injured areas, sometimes subcutaneous in belly fat. Vendor: Canlabs.
